description_long: This humanoid robot features a predominantly red and white color scheme with a conical torso marked by a large white cross and the words 'RESCUE TEAM,' suggesting an emergency or rescue function. Its head is a smooth, rounded dome with a blue-tinted faceplate displaying two glowing blue rectangular eyes, and no visible mouth or nose. The arms are segmented and jointed, ending in hands with articulated fingers, and the legs are similarly jointed, terminating in simple, blocky feet. The back of the torso displays a rectangular panel resembling a solar cell or vent, and a gold circular detail near the neck. The robot's design is sleek and functional, with smooth surfaces and clear articulation points at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles. The overall appearance is friendly and approachable, with a focus on utility and visibility in urban environments.
description: A red and white humanoid robot with a rescue theme, blue glowing eyes, articulated limbs, and a conical torso marked with a cross and 'RESCUE TEAM' text.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's blue faceplate with glowing eyes, rescue cross, and 'RESCUE TEAM' text on the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, arm and leg joints, and the conical shape of the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a rectangular panel (possibly a solar cell or vent) on the back and a gold circular detail near the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg articulation.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hanging at the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No separate clothing; the robot features integrated colored panels and markings, including a rescue cross and text, with smooth, molded surfaces.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a blue-tinted rectangular display with two glowing blue rectangular eyes, no visible mouth or nose, and a smooth, rounded helmet-like head.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible ball or hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; hands have articulated fingers, suggesting a good range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include the blue faceplate area, likely containing cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors are clearly visible.
